name: Team Operations
description: Primary esports team operations surface with team overview dashboard, player roster, and individual player profiles tracking form and activity.

page_briefs.overview: Team command center. Top kpi-grid surfaces win rate, map win rate, average match score, rank delta, and scrims this week. Below, a detail scoreboard-live tracks the team's current or most recent match with round-by-round scoring, player kills, and objectives. Right rail renders an activity-feed of roster changes, scrim results, VOD uploads, and sponsor updates.
page_briefs.roster: Player roster page. Top region renders a team player-form-tracker plotting each player's recent performance trend side-by-side so coaches can spot form dips across the squad. Below, a content card-grid shows player cards with photo, handle, role, nationality, and KDA snapshot — clickable through to player detail.
page_briefs.player-detail: Single player profile page. Top region shows an individual player-form-tracker charting match-by-match performance over the last season. Middle region renders a chart-grid with KDA, damage per round, objective participation, and hero pool distribution. Bottom region lists an activity-feed of match appearances, VOD reviews, scrim participation, and coaching notes.
